name: Medidata Clinical Cloud API
what_it_does: Medidata (Dassault Systèmes) REST and SOAP APIs for clinical trial management platform. Enables AI agents to retrieve clinical trial data from Rave EDC, access patient and site data, query study configuration, monitor data quality checks, and integrate Medidata clinical data into regulatory and operations workflows. Medidata is the dominant EDC platform in pharmaceutical clinical trials.
use_cases: Retrieving clinical trial subject data from clinical operations monitoring agents
Accessing data quality discrepancy status from clinical data management agents
Querying site enrollment and monitoring metrics from trial management agents
Integrating Medidata clinical data into regulatory submission workflow agents
best_when: A pharmaceutical or CRO using Medidata Rave wants AI agents to monitor trial progress, track data quality, and integrate clinical data into study management and regulatory workflows.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY + PRIVACY: Clinical trial patient data is subject to HIPAA, ICH-GCP, FDA 21 CFR Part 11, and applicable privacy regulations globally. Patient data requires the highest level of protection. Access must be authorized per trial protocol and IRB approval.

auth.notes: Medidata API uses OAuth 2.0 with Medidata authentication service. Application registration and approval required. Study-level access controls. GCP audit trail maintained.

pricing.paid_tiers: Clinical trial platform pricing per study and feature module
pricing.notes: Dassault Systèmes-owned. Significant enterprise investment for clinical trials. Pricing per study and seat.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY + PRIVACY: Clinical trial patient data requires IRB approval, GCP compliance, and 21 CFR Part 11
No public MCP server — enterprise OAuth2 REST API with study-level access controls
GCP audit trail requirements — all API access must be logged and attributed to authorized personnel
Medidata API version must match study configuration — verify version compatibility per study
Patient data anonymization/pseudonymization required for most analytical use cases
Medidata sandbox requires separate provisioning — contact Medidata for developer environment
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Clinical trial patient data. HIPAA, ICH-GCP, 21 CFR Part 11, SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. GCP audit trail. EU data residency. Highest regulatory bar.

security_score_components.security_notes: Clinical trial patient data. HIPAA, GCP, 21 CFR Part 11, SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. GCP audit trail. EU data residency.
